hero.title: By your side for your rights.
hero.p1: Agenzia Javed was born with the aim of simplifying the relationship between the citizen and the public administration.
hero.p2: As the main pillar of Javed Group, we offer a multidisciplinary service ranging from tax consultancy to social security support, guaranteeing precision and timeliness in every procedure.

experience.title: Consolidated Experience
experience.text: Years of activity in the CAF and Patronato sector allow us to competently manage even the most complex situations, providing clear answers to our clients.

community.title: Community Support
community.text: We are proud to be a point of reference for the Gallarate community, fostering integration and access to essential services through multilingual assistance.
